<!-- Source of truth: the tool's Python source file(s) listed at the bottom. -->

# Azure Tools

## Overview

gSage AI — Azure cost analytics and savings recommendations.

## Tools in this group

| Tool | Summary | Permissions | Requires approval | Core |
| --- | --- | --- | :---: | :---: |
| `azure_costs` | Azure cost analytics: current MTD, history, top resources, RG breakdown, Advisor recommendations and consolidated savings. | `azure:read` | — | — |
| `azure_dashboard` | Azure dashboards: subscription overview, compute health, cost summary, waste report, AKS, databases. | `azure:read` | — | — |
| `azure_inventory` | Read-only Azure inventory: subscriptions, RGs, VMs, disks, IPs, NICs, SQL, App Services, AKS, storage, snapshots, orphans. Auto-CSV on >100 rows. | `azure:read` | — | — |
| `azure_manage` | Approval-gated Azure VM management: start/stop/restart/resize, update tags, configure auto-shutdown. | `azure:write` | ✓ | — |
| `azure_metrics` | Azure Monitor time-series for VM/disk/AppService/SQL plus VM uptime from Activity Log. | `azure:read` | — | — |

## Configuration

> The JSON below goes into the **configtool model** in the web UI (per organisation; can also be scoped to a department).

> **Multiple profiles supported** — you may create more than one config row per organisation, each with a distinct `profile_id`. The agent picks one via the `config_profile` parameter at call time. State, rate limits and circuit-breaker counters are isolated per profile.

> **Sensitive fields** (api keys / passwords / tokens) are *omitted* from the JSON below — set them via environment variables (see the _Environment variables_ table) or directly in the encrypted DB row from the web UI.

### Empty configtool template (required fields only)

```json
{}
```

### Example configtool model

```json
{
  "client_id": "",
  "client_secret": "",
  "cloud_environment": "AzurePublicCloud",
  "default_resource_group": "",
  "default_subscription_id": "",
  "tenant_id": "",
  "timeout": 60
}
```

### Field reference

| Field | Type | Required | Sensitive | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | :---: | :---: | --- | --- |
| `client_id` | `string` | — | — | `""` | Service Principal application (client) ID. |
| `client_secret` | `string` | — | — | `""` | Service Principal secret (sensitive). |
| `cloud_environment` | `string` | — | — | `"AzurePublicCloud"` | Azure cloud environment (default 'AzurePublicCloud'). |
| `default_resource_group` | `string` | — | — | `""` | Optional default resource group used by management actions when not provided in params. |
| `default_subscription_id` | `string` | — | — | `""` | Subscription used when the caller omits 'params.subscription_id'. |
| `tenant_id` | `string` | — | — | `""` | Microsoft Entra ID (Azure AD) tenant ID (UUID). |
| `timeout` | `integer` | — | — | `60` | HTTP request timeout in seconds (default 60). |

## Environment variables

The variables below are derived automatically from each tool's `config_schema`. Set them in your `.env` (or via your secrets backend) to seed defaults for every organisation. **Per-org DB config takes precedence over env vars.**

| Variable | Maps to field | Type | Default | Sensitive | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
| `TOOL_AZURE__CLIENT_ID` | `client_id` | `string` | `""` | — | Service Principal application (client) ID. |
| `TOOL_AZURE__CLIENT_SECRET` | `client_secret` | `string` | `""` | — | Service Principal secret (sensitive). |
| `TOOL_AZURE__CLOUD_ENVIRONMENT` | `cloud_environment` | `string` | `"AzurePublicCloud"` | — | Azure cloud environment (default 'AzurePublicCloud'). |
| `TOOL_AZURE__DEFAULT_RESOURCE_GROUP` | `default_resource_group` | `string` | `""` | — | Optional default resource group used by management actions when not provided in params. |
| `TOOL_AZURE__DEFAULT_SUBSCRIPTION_ID` | `default_subscription_id` | `string` | `""` | — | Subscription used when the caller omits 'params.subscription_id'. |
| `TOOL_AZURE__TENANT_ID` | `tenant_id` | `string` | `""` | — | Microsoft Entra ID (Azure AD) tenant ID (UUID). |
| `TOOL_AZURE__TIMEOUT` | `timeout` | `integer` | `60` | — | HTTP request timeout in seconds (default 60). |

_Note: any field above can also be overridden per-tool by using the prefix `TOOL_<TOOL_NAME>__` instead of the shared `TOOL_<NAMESPACE>__` — useful when a single tool in the family needs a distinct value._

## Operations

### `azure_costs`

- **`cost_by_resource_group`** — _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `profile` | `string` | — | — |
  | `subscription_id` | `string` | — | Override the profile default subscription. |
  | `history_days` | `integer` | — | [cost_history] Window in days (default 30, max 365). |
  | `top_n` | `integer` | — | [top_resources_by_cost] How many resources to return (default 20). |
  | `category` | `string` | — | [recommendations] Advisor category filter (default Cost). |
  | `force_refresh` | `boolean` | — | Bypass the Redis cache (TTL 300s). |

### `azure_inventory`

- **`describe_resource`** — _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `resource_id` | `string` | — | [describe_resource] Full Azure resource ID (/subscriptions/.../providers/...). |

- **`list_aks_clusters`** — _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `profile` | `string` | — | GSageToolConfig profile (Service Principal) to use. Omit for the 'default' profile. |
  | `subscription_id` | `string` | — | Override the profile default subscription. Ignored for 'list_subscriptions'. |
  | `resource_group` | `string` | — | Filter by resource group. Optional for most list_* actions; required for some describe_* lookups. |
  | `tag` | `string` | — | Filter resources by tag. Accepts either 'key' (any value) or 'key=value'. |
  | `power_state` | `string` | — | [list_vms] Filter VMs by power state (requires an extra instance_view call per VM). |
  | `include_power_state` | `boolean` | — | [list_vms] Enrich each VM with its power state (default false; adds 1 API call per VM). |
  | `attached` | `boolean` | — | [list_disks, list_public_ips] Filter by attachment state. true = attached only; false = orphan only; omit for both. |
  | `older_than_days` | `integer` | — | [list_snapshots] Only include snapshots older than N days. |
  | `server_name` | `string` | — | [list_sql_databases] SQL server name. Required. |
  | `resource_id` | `string` | — | [describe_resource] Full Azure resource ID (/subscriptions/.../providers/...). |
  | `max_results` | `integer` | — | Maximum items to return (default 100, hard cap 1000). |
  | `force_refresh` | `boolean` | — | Bypass the Redis cache for this call (still writes the fresh value back). Cache TTL is 300s. |
  | `export_csv` | `boolean` | — | Force CSV artifact even for small results. CSV is generated automatically when the result exceeds 100 rows regardless. |
  | `export_json` | `boolean` | — | Persist the full result as a JSON artifact for programmatic post-processing. |

### `azure_manage`

- **`add_shutdown_schedule`** — _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `shutdown_time` | `string` | — | [add_shutdown_schedule] Daily shutdown time in 24h HHMM format (e.g. '1900'). |
  | `time_zone` | `string` | — | [add_shutdown_schedule] IANA/Windows time zone (e.g. 'E. South America Standard Time'). |

- **`resize_vm`** — _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `vm_size` | `string` | — | [resize_vm] New Azure SKU (e.g. Standard_D4s_v5). |
  | `force` | `boolean` | — | [resize_vm] Bypass the per-region SKU availability check (default false). |

- **`restart_vm`** — _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `profile` | `string` | — | — |
  | `subscription_id` | `string` | — | — |
  | `resource_group` | `string` | ✓ | Resource group of the target VM. |
  | `name` | `string` | ✓ | VM name. |
  | `reason` | `string` | ✓ | Free-form justification recorded in the audit log. |
  | `mode` | `string` | — | [stop_vm] 'deallocate' (default, stops billing) or 'power_off' (retains state, still billed). |
  | `vm_size` | `string` | — | [resize_vm] New Azure SKU (e.g. Standard_D4s_v5). |
  | `force` | `boolean` | — | [resize_vm] Bypass the per-region SKU availability check (default false). |
  | `tags` | `object` | — | [update_vm_tags] Tag dict to apply (merged by default). |
  | `replace` | `boolean` | — | [update_vm_tags] Replace the entire tag set instead of merging (default false). |
  | `shutdown_time` | `string` | — | [add_shutdown_schedule] Daily shutdown time in 24h HHMM format (e.g. '1900'). |
  | `time_zone` | `string` | — | [add_shutdown_schedule] IANA/Windows time zone (e.g. 'E. South America Standard Time'). |
  | `wait` | `boolean` | — | Wait for long-running operations to complete (default true). Set to false to return immediately with the LRO operation status. |

- **`start_vm`** — _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `profile` | `string` | — | — |
  | `subscription_id` | `string` | — | — |
  | `resource_group` | `string` | ✓ | Resource group of the target VM. |
  | `name` | `string` | ✓ | VM name. |
  | `reason` | `string` | ✓ | Free-form justification recorded in the audit log. |
  | `mode` | `string` | — | [stop_vm] 'deallocate' (default, stops billing) or 'power_off' (retains state, still billed). |
  | `vm_size` | `string` | — | [resize_vm] New Azure SKU (e.g. Standard_D4s_v5). |
  | `force` | `boolean` | — | [resize_vm] Bypass the per-region SKU availability check (default false). |
  | `tags` | `object` | — | [update_vm_tags] Tag dict to apply (merged by default). |
  | `replace` | `boolean` | — | [update_vm_tags] Replace the entire tag set instead of merging (default false). |
  | `shutdown_time` | `string` | — | [add_shutdown_schedule] Daily shutdown time in 24h HHMM format (e.g. '1900'). |
  | `time_zone` | `string` | — | [add_shutdown_schedule] IANA/Windows time zone (e.g. 'E. South America Standard Time'). |
  | `wait` | `boolean` | — | Wait for long-running operations to complete (default true). Set to false to return immediately with the LRO operation status. |

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |

### `azure_metrics`

- **`app_service_metrics`** — _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
